The licensor grants the licensee a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the software.
All intellectual property ownership remains with the licensor.
The software is provided 'as is' and the licensor disclaims all implied warranties of merchantability.

ABUSIVE ADDENDUM:
The provider reserves the right to modify these terms unilaterally at any time without notice. The client waives all legal rights including the right to a trial.
